description_long: This is an electric guitar with a distinctive offset body shape, finished in a sunburst pattern that transitions from a deep brown edge to a lighter amber center. The body features a white pickguard and two black pickups, along with a set of control knobs and a toggle switch. The neck is dark, likely made of rosewood or ebony, with large rectangular inlays on the fretboard and a set neck joint. The headstock is angled and features a unique, slightly asymmetrical design with all tuning pegs aligned on one side. The hardware, including the bridge and tuners, appears metallic and robust, suitable for urban performance settings. The overall design suggests a classic, high-quality instrument often seen in rock or blues genres.
description: A sunburst-finished electric guitar with an offset body, white pickguard, dual pickups, and a distinctive angled headstock. It features metallic hardware and large fretboard inlays.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the guitar's thickness and the protruding bridge and control knobs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the sunburst finish, smooth back contour, and neck joint.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile focusing on the neck, headstock, and the alignment of tuning pegs.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the sunburst body, white pickguard, dual pickups, control knobs, and detailed fretboard inlays.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled, asymmetrical headstock with all tuning pegs on one side and a distinctive contour.
